name: Ministry of Education and Science
notes: Sets national education policy; supervises NACID/NEAA and issues ordinances affecting recognition and documentation

name: National Center for Information and Documentation (NACID)
notes: Bulgarian ENIC-NARIC; runs recognition for foreign qualifications and apostille services via portal.nacid.bg/apostille.bg

name: National Evaluation and Accreditation Agency (NEAA)
notes: National QA/accreditation agency (EQAR-listed); accreditation decisions influence recognition/eligibility

name: Ministry of Foreign Affairs – Consular Affairs
notes: Publishes visa/travel guidance and coordinates legalization of public documents for use abroad
